dialogue_text: He would likely have arranged to meet them just without the city, and so—
source_excerpt: "He would likely have arranged to meet them just without the city, and so—" I heard no more, they had passed on; but it was enough. Our plan had been discovered, and the chances for escape from now on to the fearful end would be small in...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
